title: Useful services when moving without a job
intro: Temporary housing, money transfers, banking, and insurance comparison often matter before local income is in place.

items.reason: Temporary housing for internationals before long-term setup.
Multi-currency and transfers before local banking is arranged.
App-first Dutch banking often used by expats during early setup.
Compare Dutch health insurance after arrival.
